Now I see the full picture. Let me list all the objects:
- Node 2: N bar at [[9, 28], [9, 29], [11, 29], [11, 28], [10, 29]] (shrunk, 5 pixels)
- Node 3-8: Red pixels forming the green cross at (10, 52)
- Node 4: Red dot at (10, 28) inside the N bar
- Node 9: g container at [[18, 36], [18, 48], [24, 48], [24, 36]] (green container)
- Node 11: G bar at [[19, 42], [23, 42]] (inside green container, separator between N U-shapes)
- Node 13: N U-shape at [[20, 38], ...] (left N U-shape, 7 pixels)
- Node 14: N U-shape at [[20, 44], ...] (right N U-shape, 7 pixels)
- Node 16: Y bar at [[28, 9], [28, 11], [32, 11], [32, 9]] (shrunk, 14 pixels)
- Node 17: Red dot at (31, 10) inside the Y bar
- Node 18: g container at [[35, 21], [35, 27], [47, 27], [47, 21]] (yellow container)
- Node 21: G bar at [[41, 22], [41, 26]] (inside yellow container, separator between Y U-shapes)
- Node 20: Y U-shape at [[37, 23], ...] (top Y U-shape, 7 pixels)
- Node 23: Y U-shape at [[43, 23], ...] (bottom Y U-shape, 7 pixels)
- Node 24-28: Red pixels forming the yellow cross at (52, 10)
- Node 1: G bar at [[9, 27], [11, 27]] (left of N bar)
- Node 15: G bar at [[27, 9], [27, 11]] (above Y bar)
- Node 29: G bottom bar at [[63, 0], [63, 54]] (timer)
So the objects are:
1. N bar (green, horizontal, top) with red dot
2. Y bar (yellow, vertical, left) with red dot
3. Green container with two N U-shapes (left and right)
4. Yellow container with two Y U-shapes (top and bottom)
5. Green cross (red, top-right)
6. Yellow cross (red, bottom-left)
7. G bars (separators inside containers, and adjacent to N/Y bars)
8. Bottom bar (timer)
I've tried clicking on:
- N U-shapes (shrink/expand N bar)
- Y U-shapes (shrink/expand Y bar)
- Container borders (same as left/top U-shapes)
- Red dots (no effect)
- Crosses (no effect)
- G bars (no effect)
What I haven't tried:
- The G separator bars inside the containers (node 11 at [[19, 42], [23, 42]] and node 21 at [[41, 22], [41, 26]])
- The background
Let me try clicking on the G separator bar inside the green container. Node 11 is at [[19, 42], [23, 42]], which is a vertical bar at col 42, rows 19-23. Let me click at (21, 42).

sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try clicking on the G separator bar inside the green container
# Node 11 is at [[19, 42], [23, 42]], vertical bar at col 42, rows 19-23
# Click at (21, 42)
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 21, 'col': 42}])
print("Action result:", last_action_result)

# Check all changes
if last_transition and last_transition.before_frame:
    seg_before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
    seg_after = current_frame.segmentation
    before_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in seg_before['nodes']}
    after_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in seg_after['nodes']}
    
    print("\n=== All changes ===")
    for nid in set(list(before_nodes.keys()) + list(after_nodes.keys())):
        if nid in before_nodes and nid in after_nodes:
            before = before_nodes[nid]
            after = after_nodes[nid]
            if before['boundary'] != after['boundary'] or before['children'] != after['children']:
                print(f"Node {nid} ({after['color']}): boundary {before['boundary']} -> {after['boundary']}")
        elif nid in after_nodes:
            print(f"Node {nid} ({after_nodes[nid]['color']}): NEW")
        else:
            print(f"Node {nid} ({before_nodes[nid]['color']}): REMOVED")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
